text:
I am here by requesting to take over maintainer-ship of the following 3 ports.
audio/freeswitch-sounds, audio/freeswitch-music, and the net/freeswitch meta port.

After a discussion withthe current maintainer 

MAINTAINER=     ecrist@secure-computing.net

he has agreed to allow me to take maintainer-ship

new MAINTAINER=     r.neese@gmail.com
